name: Oh-Boy Oreo Cookie Pound/Tube Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9-inch fluted tube pan.
2. Cut each Oreo cookie into quarters.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and remaining ingredients except for the cookies and chocolate glaze until well blended.
4. Increase mixer speed to high and beat for 2 minutes, scraping the sides of the bowl.
5. Pour about three-quarters of the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Gently stir in the cut-up Oreo cookies and pour the rest of the batter into the pan.
7. Bake for 50 minutes or until the cake springs back when lightly touched with a finger (the toothpick test is not reliable).
8. Let the cake cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then remove it from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
9. When the cake is cooled, prepare the chocolate glaze by placing the cake on a rack over a large plate to catch drips.
10. Pour warm glaze over the top and sides of the cake.
Chocolate Glaze: In a quart saucepan over low heat, melt together chocolate pieces, shortening, milk, and corn syrup, stirring constantly until smooth.
This cake freezes well and stays cold from the refrigerator.
